{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Heart of Rebirth
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Heart of Rebirth]] is an artifact that required several citizens of [[Cana]] to pay its cost to become functional.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
